{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = White Fox binding
| introduced = cradle-05-ghostwater
}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|A [[White Fox binding]] can create an illusion that includes sound and smell.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c2">''Ghostwater'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
